name: WiFi CSI Capture
description: Real-time WiFi CSI capture with live heatmap display and UDP streaming to Jetson/laptop/Android nodes.
author: Buddhas-Watch

name: BLE CSI Stream
description: Stream CSI data over Bluetooth LE to Android/desktop companion apps. GATT service with metadata and data characteristics.
author: Buddhas-Watch

name: Settings
description: Device configuration: WiFi credentials, BLE toggle, display brightness, logging preferences and node ID.
author: Buddhas-Watch
